e2e.label: Playwright smoke gate
e2e.note: [e2e-unverified] Still blocked: prisma/seed.ts inserts the super-admin user without setting app.current_tenant_id via SET LOCAL, so the tenant_isolation_users RLS policy rejects it. Not fixed this cycle (out of scope) — declined to bypass RLS. Root cause and fix documented in the 2026-07-12 MILESTONE gate CHANGELOG entry.
